hero.title: Inspiring journeys.
hero.subtitle: Personalized routes, local tips, live conditions and alpine knowledge — all in one companion.
hero.tagline: Your local companion in the mountains.
hero.originLine: Crafted in the heart of South Tyrol, Italy

home.josephineGuide: Let's find the right mountain day for you.
home.smartRecommendationsDesc: Answer a few questions and Josephine will suggest a perfect trail or rifugio.

home.exploreByThemeDesc: Tell Josephine your mood and she'll find the right alpine experience.
home.themeLakeDayDesc: A still mountain lake, the kind you can't stop photographing.
home.themeMalgaDesc: Find a mountain hut for a plate of speck, cheese and homemade strudel.
home.themeEasyWalkDesc: A gentle path with gorgeous views — no sweat required.
home.themeDogFriendlyDesc: Trails your four-legged companion will love just as much as you.
home.themeRomanticDesc: A sunset ridge or alpine meadow for two.
home.themeRainyDayDesc: Sheltered forest paths that are beautiful even in the clouds.
home.themeParentsDesc: Comfortable, rewarding trails for all generations.
home.themeHalfDayDesc: Back in time for dinner — a complete alpine moment in just a few hours.
home.themeHutToHutDesc: Multi-day routes from rifugio to rifugio through the Dolomites.

donate.title: Buy Josephine a coffee
donate.subtitle: Josephine is a small, independent labour of love. A coffee or two helps keep the trails mapped, the rifugios up to date, and the lights on. Thank you for your support.
donate.secure: Secure checkout via Lemon Squeezy. We never see your card details.
donate.comingSoon: Donations are coming soon — thank you for wanting to support the cause! Please check back shortly.

safetyDisclaimer.title: Safety Disclaimer
safetyDisclaimer.checkWeatherDesc: Verify current and forecast weather. Mountain conditions can change rapidly.
safetyDisclaimer.informSomeoneDesc: Tell a friend or family member your hiking plans and expected return time.
safetyDisclaimer.properEquipmentDesc: Bring water, food, first aid kit, appropriate clothing, and emergency supplies.
safetyDisclaimer.backupNavigationDesc: GPS is supplementary. Always carry physical maps and a compass.
safetyDisclaimer.knowLimitsDesc: Choose trails appropriate for your fitness level and experience.
safetyDisclaimer.disclaimerText: You acknowledge that hiking involves inherent risks. Josephine provides trail information for informational purposes only and assumes no liability for accidents, injuries, or incidents. You hike at your own risk and are solely responsible for your safety.
safetyDisclaimer.iUnderstand: I understand the risks and have read the safety guidelines. I am prepared for this hike and accept full responsibility for my safety.

weather.title: Weather Conditions
weather.highWindAlert: ⚠️ High winds expected. Exercise caution on exposed ridges.
weather.snowAlert: ❄️ Snow possible. Bring warm layers and check trail conditions.
weather.rainAlert: 🌧️ Rain expected. Trails may be slippery.
weather.stormAlert: ⚡ Thunderstorm risk. Consider postponing your hike.
weather.coldAlert: 🥶 Very cold temperatures. Dress in warm layers.
weather.heatAlert: 🌡️ High temperatures. Stay hydrated and start early.
weather.conditionsOptimal: Conditions are optimal for alpine hiking
weather.conditionsGood: Good hiking weather with minor concerns
weather.conditionsCaution: Hiking possible but requires caution and preparation
weather.conditionsPoor: Challenging conditions - only for experienced hikers

safety.title: Safety Tips
safety.checkWeather: Check weather forecast and trail conditions
safety.tellSomeone: Tell someone your plans and expected return time
safety.startEarly: Start early to avoid afternoon storms
safety.planCampsites: Plan and research campsites in advance
safety.foodStorage: Learn proper food storage in bear country
safety.knowRoute: Study the route and alternative paths thoroughly
safety.technicalSkills: Ensure you have necessary technical skills
safety.stayHydrated: Drink water regularly, don't wait until thirsty
safety.stayOnPath: Stay on marked trails to avoid getting lost
safety.paceYourself: Pace yourself - it's not a race
safety.takeBreaks: Take regular breaks to rest and refuel
safety.setupBeforeDark: Set up camp with enough daylight remaining
safety.weatherChanges: Watch for sudden weather changes in mountains
safety.turnBackIfNeeded: Turn back if conditions become dangerous
safety.signalHelp: Use whistle (3 blasts) to signal for help
safety.firstAid: Know basic first aid and carry a kit
safety.alpineWarningText: Mountain weather can change rapidly. Always be prepared for sudden temperature drops, wind, and precipitation. Altitude can affect physical performance and judgment. Know the signs of altitude sickness and hypothermia.

slide1.title: Meet Josephine
slide1.description: Josephine is your friendly local guide for South Tyrol. Tell her what kind of alpine day you want — and she'll find something beautiful.
slide1.feature1: Discover trails, rifugios and local mountain moments

slide2.title: Local curation you can trust
slide2.description: Every trail and rifugio in Josephine is verified and handpicked from South Tyrol. From lakeside paths to hidden malgas.

slide3.title: Save your favourites
slide3.description: Save trails and rifugios you love. Build your own little atlas of alpine places to return to.
slide3.feature1: One-tap saving for trails and rifugios

slide4.title: Crafted in South Tyrol
slide4.description: Josephine was born in the heart of the Alps. We know these mountains — and we want to help you fall in love with them too.
slide4.feature2: Fully available in English, Italian and German
slide4.feature3: Start exploring — your mountain day is waiting

splash.footer: Crafted in the heart of South Tyrol, Italy

convo.user1: I have 3 hours and I want to feel small.
convo.josephine1: Seceda ridge. Go at 7am — before the cable cars open. You'll have the entire Dolomites horizon to yourself.
convo.josephine2: Medium effort, pure reward. The last 200 metres are steep, but every step earns the view.

paths.multiDayTitle:
Hut to hut.
Day by day.

josephineChat.greeting: Ciao! ✦ I'm Josephine, your alpine companion. I know these mountains inside out — the hidden paths, the best rifugios, the moments that take your breath away.
josephineChat.weatherPrompt: The weather is perfect today for a panoramic hike. What kind of adventure are you after?
josephineChat.startOver: Let's start fresh. What kind of adventure are you after today?
josephineChat.welcomeBack: Welcome back! Last time you went for a {{difficulty}} trail near {{region}}. Same vibe today, or something different?
josephineChat.noApiKey: I know these mountains well, but I'd need a moment to think about that one. Try asking me about opening times, trail difficulty, or how to reach a rifugio!
josephineChat.windError: The mountain winds are interfering — try again in a moment.
josephineChat.searchingNear: On it — let me find something near {{area}} for you…
josephineChat.searching: Let me find you something good…
josephineChat.step1Question: How much time do you have today?
josephineChat.step3Question: What's calling you? Pick as many as you like, then tap Done ✓
josephineChat.step4Question: Are you hiking with your dog?
josephineChat.noMatchIntro: Hmm, I couldn't find the perfect match this time
josephineChat.loadingTrail: Let me find the perfect trail for you…
josephineChat.refineShorter: Got it — looking for something shorter for you.
josephineChat.refineEasier: No problem — I'll find something gentler.
josephineChat.moodPlanPrompt: Tell me the day you want — your mood, how much time you have, who's with you. Try: “a peaceful walk and a good lunch, I'm a bit tired.”
josephineChat.planTomorrowAck: Lovely — same place at sunrise tomorrow. You beat the crowds and catch the best light.
josephineChat.almanacPlanAck: Wonderful — let me find something that fits the moment…
josephineChat.almanacNoMore: That's the lot for this week. Want me to plan your day around one of these?
josephineChat.almanacNothing: Nothing especially fleeting on the mountain this exact moment — but I can still plan you a perfect day. Want me to?
josephineChat.moodIntro: What sounds perfect today? Pick the one that fits your mood.
josephineChat.optionsIntro: I found three beautiful options for you. Each one fits what you're after. ✦
josephineChat.savedTitle: All set! Your day is saved. Let's make it unforgettable. ✦
josephineChat.tipClear: Start by 09:00 for the best light and coolest air
josephineChat.tipHot: Head to altitude or start before 09:00 — valley heat builds fast
josephineChat.tipStorm: Be back in the valley before 13:00
josephineChat.tipRain: Rifugio hops and forest paths are ideal today
josephineChat.tipFog: Stick to marked paths — valley trails are magic today
josephineChat.tipCloud: No storm risk — great day for a long walk
josephineChat.conditionsHot: Great day — start early to beat the heat
josephineChat.conditionsStorm: Storm risk — short morning window only
josephineChat.qaDuration: {{name}} takes around {{h}}h at a steady pace.
josephineChat.qaDiffHard: Best for fit, experienced hikers — good footwear matters.
josephineChat.qaDiffModerate: A moderate effort — steady fitness and proper shoes recommended.
josephineChat.qaFood: Near {{name}} you've got {{rifs}} for a bite or a rest.
josephineChat.qaFamilyNo: {{name}} isn't marked family-friendly — probably better for older kids or adults.
josephineChat.wgStorm: Afternoon thunderstorms are forecast over the peaks today. The mountains are still worth it — but I'd plan a short morning window and be back in the valley before 13:00. Half-day itinerary?
josephineChat.wgRain: It's raining in South Tyrol today — that moody, cinematic kind of beautiful. Forest paths and rifugios are your friends. I know sheltered routes that are magical in the wet. Want one?
josephineChat.wgSnow: Fresh snow on the upper routes today ({{temp}}°C). Snowshoe trails and mountain huts are at their best — a completely different kind of mountain day. Want me to find something?
josephineChat.wgFog: Mist is drifting through the valleys this morning — that rare atmospheric light that makes the mountains look like a painting. Perfect for a low-altitude walk. Shall I find one?
josephineChat.wgWind: Strong wind on the exposed ridges today — up to {{wind}} km/h. I'd steer you toward sheltered forest trails and valley paths rather than the high routes. Want a recommendation?
josephineChat.wgClearHot: Blue skies today, but warm — {{temp}}°C in the valley. Worth starting early or heading to altitude for cooler air. I know some trails near water too. What sounds right?
josephineChat.wgClear: Perfect conditions today — {{temp}}°C, clear skies, excellent visibility. The mountains are putting on a show. What kind of adventure are you after?
josephineChat.wgCloudPartly: Sun and cloud today, {{temp}}°C — classic alpine light. Not too hot, great for walking. What kind of adventure are you after?
josephineChat.wgOvercast: Overcast today — dramatic skies, quieter trails, beautiful diffused light. {{temp}}°C and no crowds. A great day to go somewhere new. What sounds right?
josephineChat.wgDefault: The weather is looking good for a mountain day. {{tempPart}}what kind of adventure are you after?
josephineChat.remarkStorm1: Waterproof jacket on, early start, off the ridge before noon. Those afternoon clouds aren't negotiating.
josephineChat.remarkStorm2: Pack a rain shell and move early. Once those storms build over the peaks, they mean it.
josephineChat.remarkStorm3: Get moving before 09:00. Rain layer on top, and keep an eye on the south sky.
josephineChat.remarkRain1: Grab a waterproof jacket — forest paths in the rain are stunning, you just need the right kit.
josephineChat.remarkRain2: It'll be moody and beautiful out there. Rain jacket, waterproof boots, and lean into it.
josephineChat.remarkRain3: Pack a proper rain layer. The mountains have a whole other mood when it's wet.
josephineChat.remarkFog1: Misty conditions — stick to marked paths and enjoy that rare light.
josephineChat.remarkFog2: The fog gives the valleys a completely different personality. Low routes, good footing, no rush.
josephineChat.remarkHeat1: {{temp}}°C today — sunscreen, sunglasses, and at least 2 litres of water before you set off.
josephineChat.remarkHeat2: It's hot. Sunglasses, sunscreen, full water bottle. Start early or head straight to altitude.
josephineChat.remarkHeat3: Serious mountain sun today. Factor 50 above 2000m — the rock reflects more UV than you'd expect.
josephineChat.remarkWind1: Wind up to {{wind}} km/h on the exposed sections — a windproof shell makes a real difference up high.
josephineChat.remarkWind2: {{wind}} km/h on the ridges. Windproof layer on top and you're set.
josephineChat.remarkPerfect1: Sunglasses and sunscreen — the high-altitude sun is stronger than it looks.
josephineChat.remarkPerfect2: Perfect day. Sunscreen, camera, and don't forget a light layer for the descent when it cools.
josephineChat.remarkPerfect3: Clear skies, strong sun at altitude. Sunglasses aren't optional up here.
josephineChat.remarkDefault1: Light jacket in the pack — temperature drops fast when cloud rolls over the peaks.
josephineChat.remarkDefault2: Lovely hiking weather. A thin layer in your bag and you're good to go.
josephineChat.remarkDefault3: No weather drama today. Pack light and enjoy it.
josephineChat.geoYesResp: Perfect — enjoy the journey there too. Let me know if you need any other info.
josephineChat.geoCloserResp: Of course — let me find something closer to you.
josephineChat.refLenHint: The shortest I suggested was {{km}} km.
josephineChat.refLenQ1: How long would you like?{{hint}} I can look for under 5 km, under 8 km — or tell me your preference.
josephineChat.refLenQ2: Good to know. What distance works for you?{{hint}} Pick below or just tell me.
josephineChat.refLenQ3: Noted. How far is comfortable for you?{{hint}} Give me a number and I'll find it.
josephineChat.refLenQShort: How long would you like?{{hint}} Tell me a distance and I'll find it.
josephineChat.refLenAck1: Perfect — finding trails under {{km}} km for you.
josephineChat.refLenAck2: On it — I'll keep it under {{km}} km.
josephineChat.refLenAck3: Got it. Looking for something under {{km}} km now.
josephineChat.refDiffQ1: How challenging would you like it? I can find something easy, moderate — or you tell me.
josephineChat.refDiffQ2: Understood. What difficulty works for you today?
josephineChat.refDiffQ3: Of course. What level are you comfortable with?
josephineChat.refDiffQShort: What difficulty works for you today?
josephineChat.refDiffEasy1: Perfect — finding something easy and scenic.
josephineChat.refDiffEasy2: On it — a relaxed trail, coming up.
josephineChat.refDiffMed1: Great — looking for a moderate route.
josephineChat.refDiffMed2: On it — something balanced, coming up.
josephineChat.noTrailsNearArea: I don't have any trails near {{area}} in my database yet. Try a nearby valley or village — or let me suggest something in the wider South Tyrol region?
josephineChat.widerRegionResp: Wonderful — let me pull a few of my favourites from across South Tyrol.
josephineChat.noDogFriendly: I couldn't find a dog-friendly trail that fits here — I'd rather tell you than send you somewhere your dog isn't welcome. Want me to widen the search or drop the area?
josephineChat.introOne1: I found one that fits beautifully — here it is. ✦
josephineChat.introOne2: One pick stands out for what you're after. Take a look. ✦
josephineChat.introOne3: Here's the one I'd choose for you today. ✦
josephineChat.introTwo1: I found two lovely options for you. Take a look. ✦
josephineChat.introTwo2: Here are two trails I think you'll love. ✦
josephineChat.introTwo3: Two picks — both curated for today. Which speaks to you? ✦
josephineChat.introThree1: I found three beautiful options for you. Each one fits what you're after. ✦
josephineChat.introThree2: Here are three trails I think you'll love. Take a look. ✦
josephineChat.introThree3: Three picks — all curated for today. Let me know which speaks to you. ✦
josephineChat.introThree4: I've pulled three routes that match perfectly. Which feels right? ✦
josephineChat.dogYes: Yes — {{name}} is marked dog-friendly, so your dog is welcome. Bring water and keep them on a leash near grazing pastures and any exposed sections.
josephineChat.dogNo: {{name}} isn't marked dog-friendly — there may be exposed, protected or livestock areas where dogs aren't ideal. I'd play it safe. Want me to find a dog-friendly trail nearby instead?
josephineChat.dogFindTrails: Happy to bring your dog along! Let me find dog-friendly trails for you…
josephineChat.transportDriveLong: a good hour and a half by car
josephineChat.transportNote1: One thing worth knowing — {{region}} is about {{km}} km from {{start}}, {{drive}}.{{bus}} Are you planning to drive, or would you like something a bit closer?
josephineChat.transportNote2: Just flagging: this trail is in {{region}}, around {{km}} km from {{start}} ({{drive}}).{{bus}} Totally worth it — just factor in the travel.
josephineChat.transportNote3: Heads up — {{region}} is about {{km}} km from {{start}}, so plan for {{drive}} each way.{{bus}}
josephineChat.dispBeatCrowds: Go now — you'll have {{place}} almost to yourself before the crowds arrive.{{access}}
josephineChat.dispPeakToday: {{place}} is at its busiest right now{{access}}. Honestly? {{alt}} is just as beautiful and far quieter today — want that instead, or catch {{place}} at sunrise tomorrow?
josephineChat.dispPlanTomorrow: It's {{time}} — for {{place}} you really want a morning to beat the crowds and the parking.{{access}} Shall I line it up for tomorrow, or take {{alt}} now instead?
josephineChat.dispDaylightRisk: That's a {{hours}}h route and it's already {{time}} — you'd be finishing in the dark. {{alt}} is a safer call for today, or do {{place}} fresh tomorrow.
josephineChat.dispAltIntro: Here it is — I think you'll be glad you went here instead. ✦
josephineChat.dispAltError: Hmm, I couldn't pull that one up — want to start over?
josephineChat.dispPlanTomorrowAck: Lovely — {{place}} at sunrise tomorrow. Beat the crowds, catch the best light, everything else stays the same.
josephineChat.dispGoAnywayAck: You got it{{place}}. Go as early as you can, and enjoy every minute.
